name: Gage Growth Corp.
summary: Gage Growth Corp. provides support services to licensed Gage-branded cannabis cultivators, processors, and provisioning centers, as well as to Cookies-branded provisioning centers. It services include management, consulting, HR, financing, intellectual property, licensing, and real estate support. The company was formerly known as Wolverine Partners Corp. and changed its name to Gage Growth Corp. in October 2020. Gage Growth Corp. was incorporated in 2017 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
